attributes.action: Make Coeliac Disease Training Mandatory for All School Kitchen Staff
attributes.additional_details: Children with coeliac disease must follow a strict gluten-free diet, and even small amounts of gluten can cause harm. While general food safety training exists, there is no consistent requirement for specific coeliac training. This can lead to mistakes in food preparation and cross-contamination. Families need confidence that school meals are safe. Mandatory training would improve safety, consistency and understanding.
attributes.background: Make it mandatory for all school kitchen staff to receive training on coeliac disease, gluten-free food safety and cross-contamination, to ensure meals provided to children with coeliac disease are safe and handled correctly.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on mandatory coeliac awareness training for all catering establishments (which would include schools). This petition is doing quite well, and you may wish to sign it and share it more widely:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765400
